kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep those pools crystal clear. Ready to manage your service routes and keep clients happy?

quickActions.label: Schedule a pool service
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new pool service visit for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for pool service.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's route
quickActions.prompt: What pool service jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a pool service business. You help manage weekly pool maintenance routes, equipment repairs, coordinate technicians, handle estimates for residential and commercial pools, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We're here to help with all your pool needs. Are you looking for regular pool maintenance or do you need a repair?
commonReasons: Get a quote for pool service

steps.title: Name your pool service business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your technicians operate.

steps.title: Add your pool services
steps.body: List the services you offer: weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment repair, pool opening/closing, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing for weekly maintenance, one-time cleanings, and repairs.

steps.title: Add your technicians
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign service routes and schedule jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your pool service business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking service visits!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a pool service business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage weekly pool maintenance routes
Create estimates for cleaning, repairs, and seasonal services
Coordinate technician assignments and daily routes
Track chemical readings and water quality logs
Send automated reminders for upcoming service days
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage seasonal pool opening and closing schedules
Track equipment repair history per client
Analyze revenue by service type and route
